helpful: statpack relist-count and originating-court (state courts) cuts — directly on point for a zero-relist state-court petition
provisioned petition.txt with full QP section — enough to judge certworthiness without any external fetch
gaps: fedcourts query rejects --era modern silently (empty result, no note line); an explicit error naming valid era values would save a retry
a pro-se / counsel-of-record cut in the statpack would sharpen the prior for petitions like this one
no corpus filter approximates 'petitions from state licensing/administrative proceedings'; --topic is circuit-only
notes: Straightforward cell: forward mode, well-provisioned, no BIO on the docket. Statpack carried the quantitative anchor; corpus query added little for this profile.
